SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-28-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-29-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.
